commit.message:
fix: auto-retry barcode import on transient server parse errors

When createProduct completes, Grocy on home-lab hardware (RPi, NAS)
occasionally returns a partial/unexpected response to the immediate
getProductDetails call, causing a decodingError.

Changes:
- Split importToGrocy into three methods for clarity
- Add 200ms pause before getProductDetails (race condition guard)
- Auto-retry up to 3 times on NetworkError.decodingError/.invalidResponse
  with 400ms back-off between attempts
- Promote guard errors to typed ImportError (cleaner error messages)

Users no longer see the 'could not parse server response' error on
first scan — retries happen transparently in the background.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: replace broken Firebase Google redirect flow

GitHub Pages runs on itjey.github.io while Firebase Auth uses
cloak-df1d8.firebaseapp.com, and modern browsers block the
cross-origin storage that signInWithRedirect depends on.

Replace Firebase's popup/redirect helper flow with a direct
Google OAuth start from the app origin using createAuthUri,
then finish auth locally with signInWithCredential(id_token).
This keeps the round-trip on the app origin and avoids the
redirect result being lost on return.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: switch Google sign-in from popup to redirect

Popup-based sign-in gets blocked by many browsers and causes
'Google sign-in was closed before it finished' errors.
Redirect-based flow is more reliable, especially on mobile
and strict browser configurations.

- Replace signInWithPopup with signInWithRedirect
- Add getRedirectResult handling in useEffect to process
  the sign-in result when the page reloads
- Handle account-exists-with-different-credential on redirect

commit.message:
fix: session isolation, agent status tracking, and idle nudge (v0.4.3) (#160)

## Summary

Fixes three bugs and adds two quality-of-life features for agent
coordination.

### Bug Fixes

**1. Cross-session agent/task leaking**
- `GET /agents` now supports `?sessionId=` filter for session-scoped
queries
- `GET /tasks` global scope: active session → session tasks only; no
active session → all historical project tasks (server-derived, no
client-supplied sessionId)
- Added `getBySession()` to `AgentRosterRepository`
- Added DB index on `agent_roster.session_id` (migration 0031)

**2. Agent shows 'idle' while still active**
- Decoupled agent display status from delegation lifecycle —
`notifyParentOfIdle()` no longer marks delegations complete
- Delegation completion now only via `COMPLETE_TASK` or agent exit
- Dedup key cleared on running transition so subsequent idle transitions
properly re-notify

### New Features

**4. Idle task nudge**
- After 30s idle with uncompleted DAG tasks, agent receives a system
reminder
- Nudges once per idle period, cancels on running/exit/terminate
- Timer properly cleaned up in all agent lifecycle paths

**5. Soft idle-role reminder**
- When creating an agent, if idle agents of the same role exist in the
session, lead gets a non-blocking reminder
- Does not prevent agent creation — informational only

### Other
- Version bumped to 0.4.3
- Removed redundant `getByProjectAndSession()` (session implies project)
- Removed duplicate-role creation guard (replaced by soft reminder)

### Tests
- Server: 3,881 tests passing
- Web: 1,494 tests passing
- New tests for idle-role reminder behavior
- Zero TypeScript errors

* fix(e2e): use distinct repo paths in hot-reload test

The hot-reload test used 'repo' for both DEMO and NEW bindings,
causing duplicate project ID rejection. Use 'other/repo' for NEW
and add hash-based project ID differentiation in mock_gitlab.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(e2e): use path param for project lookup route

Move get_project route to after all specific /api/v4/projects/...
routes and use {project_id:path} to handle URL-encoded repo paths
like other%2Frepo. Starlette decodes %2F before routing, so the
catch-all must be registered last.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(e2e): check container restart instead of pod termination

Deployment pods restart on container exit, so pod phase never
reaches Succeeded/Failed. Instead, verify the container restart
count increases after SIGTERM, then check --previous logs for
shutdown_complete.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(e2e): use kubectl delete for graceful shutdown test

PID 1 in Linux ignores signals without explicit handlers. Since
uv is PID 1 (via entrypoint exec), kill -TERM 1 is silently
ignored. Use kubectl delete --grace-period instead, which delivers
SIGTERM through the container runtime correctly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve subscriber timeout error: use SubscriptionTimeoutException instead of AbruptTerminationException (#2645) (#2727)

When subscriber-timeout fires on a FanoutProcessor with CancelTermination mode,
the actor now calls fail() with a SubscriptionTimeoutException instead of directly
calling context.stop(self). This provides a clear error message ('Subscription
timeout expired, no subscriber attached') rather than a generic
'Processor actor terminated abruptly' from AbruptTerminationException.

A warning log is also emitted when the timeout fires.

References: https://github.com/apache/pekko/issues/2645

commit.message:
Fix Java 25 stream test timeout failures (#2573) (#2728)

Motivation: JDK 25 ForkJoinPool scheduling changes cause nightly CI
stream tests to fail with timeouts — ~100+ failures per night.

Modifications:
- Increase timefactor from 2 to 3 for JDK 25+ in nightly CI workflow
- Add 30s PatienceConfig to FlowFlatMapConcatParallelismSpec (100K elements)
- Add 30s PatienceConfig to HubSpec (20K element long-stream tests)
- Increase MapAsyncPartitionedSpec patience from 5s to 15s
- Increase AggregateWithBoundarySpec Await timeouts from 10s to 30s

Result: Timing-sensitive stream tests have sufficient timeout headroom
on JDK 25, reducing false failures in nightly CI.

References: https://github.com/apache/pekko/issues/2573

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
